Issue: Native support for ignore_index in core losses and metrics to exclude specific labels (e.g., padding or unlabeled regions) from calculations in medical imaging workflows.
Decision: Implementing masking logic in DiceLoss to support ignore_index.
Rationale: To allow voxels with specific labels to be excluded from calculations, which is critical for medical imaging workflows. Subsequent updates will cover DiceMetric, MeanIoU, and other requested components.
Author: Rusheel86
Description: Core losses and metrics, specifically DiceLoss initially, to support ignore_index functionality.
Justification: The decision involves implementing new functionality (ignore_index support) in a core loss function (DiceLoss) which is part of model architecture development. Keywords like 'losses', 'metrics', and 'modeling' (implicit in loss function development) indicate this is a modeling stage activity.
